speaker: charlie
text: Well, that's your ParkSyde Bright Side wrap for tonight. From fungi fighting climate change to young athletes chasing their dreams, it's been a day full of reasons to feel optimistic about our world.

speaker: alice
text: Absolutely! Sometimes it's easy to get caught up in all the doom and gloom, but tonight's stories remind us that amazing things are happening every single day. Science is advancing, athletes are inspiring us, and our planet has some incredible tricks up its sleeve.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right, Jamie. Whether it's Portuguese wind turbines, Finnish sand batteries, or our own Aussie fighters and footballers, there's always something to celebrate if you know where to look.

speaker: alice
text: Thanks for joining us tonight, legends. Keep looking for the bright side, and remember - tomorrow's another chance for the world to surprise us with something brilliant.

speaker: charlie
text: I'm Alex Mercer, she's Jamie, and this has been ParkSyde Bright Side. Until next time, stay curious, stay positive, and enjoy this beautiful Queensland weather. Goodnight!
